items.headline: Amazon Stock Eyes Breakout On Meta AI Chip Deal
items.summary: Amazon stock climbed early Friday toward a potential breakout following news it will provide its Graviton processors to Facebook parent Meta Platforms. Meta stock gained as well. The companies announced that Meta will use "tens of millions" of Amazon Web Services' Graviton CPUs (central processing units) to power its AI offerings, according to the announcement.

items.headline: Meta Agrees to Deploy Millions of Amazon AI Chips in Deal Worth Billions
items.summary: Facebook parent company Meta has agreed to a multi-year deal to use Amazon’s AI chips in a deal that AWS says is worth billions of dollars.

items.headline: South African rand edges up as investors track US-Iran talks, await local month-end data - Reuters
items.summary: South African rand edges up as investors track US-Iran talks, await local month-end data  Reuters

items.headline: Tesla Just Disclosed That Its Pure Profit Center Will Dry Up Fast
items.summary: Regulatory credits, still a big profit center for Tesla, should fall fast going forward, according to an SEC filing.
